title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's first three years in the Twinkle
Series have come to an end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her track record is nothing to sneeze at. She
takes it in and steels herself for a momentous
decision.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Big news, Trainer! I'm... I'm ending my days as an
Umamusume otaku!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
From here on out, I'm a normal Umamusume
befitting my achievements!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As a result of that decision...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Oh my! It's another loss for Agnes Digital!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Who would've expected her losing streak to
follow her to a G3 race?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wheeze, huff... Bleeeeghhh... What's happening to me? It's like my legs have been replaced by two bars of solid steel.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
They're so heavy I can't even lift them. What is
this...

text_block_list.name: Fan Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Man. Agnes Digital's been real garbo lately.

text_block_list.name: Fan Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
You think her age is catching up with her or
something?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oooof! My aaage?! But my life is essentially a
static work of fiction. I can't age!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you hear the things they're saying about me,
Trainer?
choice_data_list: Well, you have kinda lost your spirit...
Well, you have kinda lost your spirit...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know... It's almost like I've lost the very reason I
choose to run...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Life as a normal racer is difficult. What is it that
even motivates regular runners in the first place? I
can't figure it out at all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What? Quit? You don't mean racing, do you?
choice_data_list: No. Quit trying to be a "normal" Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat? But... I made a decision. I can't go
back on my word!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems my proposal comes as a shock, but after
some thought...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Still... Mmm, hmm. There might be something to
that. I started off as a simple Horsegirl fan, after all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It was never anything refined or noble. My love
for them grew and grew, and that's what got me
here.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I abandoned those feelings. I'm like a canary
that's forgotten the sky, or a thief who's lost her
mask! Which means...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh! Return to me! Come, my blazing passion,
and awaken once more from your slumber!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The light that once shined in her eyes returns, and
then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here we are, on the final stretch of the Yasuda
Kinen! It was a fierce start but, in the end—wait!
Who's that closing in from the outside?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: UUUUUMMMAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: My love for Umas knows NOOO LIMIT!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Agnes Digital! What a miraculous comeback!
And she's set a new track record!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Um, sorry for all the fuss I've caused. I kinda lost
my true self for a while there.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But everything's fine now! As long as there are
cute Umas out there, I'll be here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A true comeback story, brought forth by enjoying
what she likes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her fans have no way of knowing what's
been going on behind the scenes.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: That... was incredible. Even better than when she was at her peak...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: I don't get her. How on earth did she do that...
